title: filix-mas squamigera
intro: Filix-mas squamigera, also known as the rough fern or the scaly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Filix-mas squamigera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Filix-mas squamigera can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves can be used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
